name: Blade Kuwagamon

signature_move.name: Spark Blade
signature_move.description: Turns into a blade of light and pierces with it.

description: An Insect-type Machine Digimon whose entire body has been weaponized. Although it is an Adult, it is a rare species whose whole body has been turned into Chrome Digizoid . It has a habit of reacting indiscriminately to anything that moves, and even Ultimate Digimon have been known to get pierced all over their bodies when attacked by a swarm of Blade Kuwagamon, killing them. Its Special Moves are turning into a blade of light and piercing with it ( Spark Blade ), and generating a vacuum wave ( Air Knife ).
